LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-25-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SCHWAN'S CONSUMER BRANDS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE HORVATH DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED "IN PERSON, BY TELEPHONE, OR BY VIDEO CONFERENCE" IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. THE RESPONSE TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY FEBRUARY 22, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
